title: tragacantha cretica
intro: Tragacantha cretica, also known as Cretan thistle or Tragacanth, is a plant species in the genus Astragalus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha cretica include soothing digestive issues, treating wounds, and reducing fever. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, and its resinous sap is also used as a gelling agent in pharmaceutical and food products.
